_meta.description: Regression gold standard — verified expected values for known carriers. Only fields present in a carrier's record are checked; absent fields are skipped. A wrong expected value is worse than none — only lock values verified against SAFER.

204814._notes: Fully verified against SAFER Jun 22 2026. Private property carrier, no MC#, no FMCSA authority or insurance filing required.

3431540._notes: Audit flagged: report showed 12 inspections, SMS shows ~9. Inspection count inflated — likely dedup issue. Add full expected values after dedup fix verified.

3612954._notes: Audit flagged: active+revoked contradiction and no-record-to-no-insurance error. Must pass validation rules 1, 6, 7 after rebuild. Expected values TBD — verify against SAFER before locking.

3841767._notes: Audit flagged: summary showed INACTIVE while body showed ACTIVE (rules 8, 9 conflict). Must not produce contradictory status across sections after rebuild.

623336._notes: Audit flagged: revoked vs active conflict. Verify against SAFER and lock expected values once resolved.

3012101._notes: Private carrier, 1 truck / 1 driver. Verified from audit notes Jun 22 2026. Must pass rules 2 and 3 (private+authority_required=NO, private+insurance_required=NO).

1612145._notes: Private property carrier, 1 truck / 1 driver. Verified from audit notes Jun 22 2026.

2308088._notes: Audit flagged: report showed 'for-hire' wording but carrier appears to be service/intrastate (rule 19). Correct carrier_type TBD — verify against SAFER before locking.

2051387._notes: Confirmed against SAFER Jul 1 2026. SAFER shows Private(Property), NOT AUTHORIZED, blank MC field. Our DB has MC940282 (import artifact) and cargo_type=PRIVATE PROPERTY. After Bug 1 fix, cargo_type must win over MC presence.
